title: Zustand-based notification store with toast management
purpose: Manages application notifications (toasts) with add, remove, and clear functionality using Zustand state management.
module_context: Exports a Zustand store with toast management actions and a helper function for generating random IDs.

steps.content: Generate a random number between 0 and 16^length.
Convert the random number to a hexadecimal string.
Pad the string with leading zeros to ensure it has the specified length.
Generate a unique ID for the toast using timestamp and random hex.
Construct the full toast object with generated ID and current timestamp.
Add the new toast to the existing toasts array in state.
IF the toast has a duration greater than zero, schedule its removal after that duration.
Filter the toasts array to exclude the toast with the specified ID.
Update the state with the filtered toasts array.
Replace the toasts array in state with an empty array.
